action.reasoning: Observation: v26 test completed but all eps have 0 safe_steps (max_streak=0), avg_safe=0, high collisions in some eps (up to 399), detector varies but safe condition never met despite detector=425 in one epi; eval also 0.0 nav_seek_success/safe_follow_steps, avg_dist~5.8m. Earlier v4-v5 reached ~50-100 safe. Analysis: OA triggers on human (depth sees humanoid as obstacle when close/detector high) causing turns away or stuck pushing (high collisions); follow mode not maintaining dist~1.5m + |angle|<0.2618 simultaneously for accumulation on dynamic oracle; speed match 0.28 + gains cause drift/overshoot. Root cause: OA not sufficiently gated by detector, loose pure-rotate threshold, imperfect err correction for persistent facing+dist. Reactive heuristic viable per literature (~0.5 follow-rate). Decision: rewrite FULL complete non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py + train.py with clean v27 HeuristicPolicy (OA strictly gated detector<0.25+min_front<0.9, turn-to-open-side using left_d vs right_d with correct sign, backup if dist<0.9 or min_front<0.6, follow on detector>0.1|dist<3.5 with base=0.26+0.18*err clipped[0.1,0.45], pure-rotate if |angle|>0.4 with linear=0, stronger ang_k=-7 to -8, seek linear=0.75 when far, robust depth with wider center 35-65% + sides 30% + valid>0.05, per-step safe+streak+max_streak+detector+coll accum using exact config angle+post-step compass, improved get_collision_delta, full JSON with make_serializable+all keys+manual safe>=500 for success+metrics fallback, abs paths+dataset+concur_render=False). Run test_full_episode.py (5 eps) to validate reduced collisions + higher safe/streak (>100 target in good epi). Then submit_eval on predict.py with updated dummy ckpt v27. This is final push for positive nav_seek_success within remaining 3 iters/5.8h.
